message:
fix(runtime): use configured repl_backlog_size in replication window and INFO output

update_backlog_window was using the compile-time DEFAULT_REPL_BACKLOG_SIZE
constant instead of the runtime-configurable self.server.repl_backlog_size,
meaning CONFIG SET repl-backlog-size had no effect on the actual replication
offset window. Now passes the live backlog_size through to the window
calculation.

INFO replication section similarly used the constant — now reads from
self.server.repl_backlog_size so the reported value matches the configured
one.

Also fixes minor formatting alignment in ServerState::default and
advance_primary_offset.

New test config_set_repl_backlog_size_updates_live_replication_info_and_window
verifies that setting backlog size to 1 byte constrains the window and
appears correctly in INFO output.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
